title: pogonospermum scabridum
intro: Pogonospermum scabridum is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as a type of bitter pepperbush or a shrub that belongs to the citrus family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, with its roots and leaves being used to alleviate nausea, indigestion, and diarrhea. The health benefits of Pogonospermum scabridum include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
